extract: Sceptile (Japanese: ジュカイン Jukain) is a Grass-type Pokémon introduced in Generation III. It evolves from Grovyle starting at level 36. It is the final form of Treecko. Sceptile can Mega Evolve into Mega Sceptile using the Sceptilite. Mega Sceptile was introduced in Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire.
